name: Low-Cholesterol Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the sunflower oil, molasses, and honey until well combined.
3. Add the egg white, water, and vanilla extract. Mix thoroughly.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients (rolled oats, white flour, whole wheat flour, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg) to the wet mixture. Stir until just combined; do not over-mix.
5. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper or grease lightly.
6. Using a spoon or cookie scoop, drop rounded portions of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the cookies have set but remain soft in the center.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
